allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=[m for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models'] if m['endpointType']=='chat']; print\(json.dumps\(models, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=[m for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models'] if m['endpointType']=='chat']; print\(json.dumps\([{'modelId':m['modelId'],'label':m['label']} for m in models], indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=[m['id'] for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data'] if 'image' in m['id'].lower\(\) or 'sd' in m['id'].lower\(\) or 'flux' in m['id'].lower\(\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(models[:20]\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; models=[m for m in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['models']]; print\(json.dumps\([{'modelId':m['modelId'],'label':m['label'],'type':m['endpointType']} for m in models], indent=2\)\)")
